title: RoundOutput
description: The structured output a role subagent must return after each round of brainwriting.

role.description: Role ID matching the assigned preset role.

ideas.description: Between 1 and 3 ideas. Quality over quantity: prefer 2 strong ideas over 3 weak ones.

sources.description: URLs from web searches that informed these ideas. Required when web_search was used.

self_critique.description: Optional 1-2 sentence honest assessment of the weakest idea in this batch.
